en: I would have said Waffle House, but whatever.
Watching Alice Cooper, and all I can think of is that he looks like a ball sack with face paint on.
The Lumineers are the musical equivalent to a triple-venti half-sweet iced caramel macchiato.
F*** them and this. Common is the pottery barn of rappers.
What the f*** do you know about rap?
Like, honestly, saying Blink-182 is your favorite band is like saying I'm okay living with herpes.
ko: 솔직히 블링크-182가 네가 좋아하는 밴드라고 말하는 건

en: Used anti-frizz shampoo on my pubes, and now my penis looks like Steve Aoki.
ko: 이제 내 성기가 스티브 아오키 같아.

en: Waterfalls by TLC has to be the worst song about waterfalls ever.
You know what, that's just some natural earth bitch, you know what I'm saying, that said that.
ko: 내가 무슨 말 하는지 알지? 그렇게 말했어.

en: Fall Out Boy is the Comic Sans MS of music.
ko: 폴아웃 보이는 음악계의 코믹 산스 MS야.

en: Zendaya's skinny AF, damn, looking like a bowl of spaghetti.
